mapper.select:
SELECT app.id, app.name, app.number, app.icon, app.icon_color, app.seq, app.description, app.cloud_id, cloud.name AS cloud_name, app.enable_flag, app.create_time, app.update_time FROM t_sys_app app LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud cloud ON cloud.id = app.cloud_id
app.cloud_id = #{form.cloudId}
AND (app.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.keyword}, '%') OR app.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY app.seq, app.id

SELECT app.id AS app_id, app.number AS app_number, app.name AS app_name, app.icon AS app_icon, app.icon_color AS app_icon_color, app.seq AS app_seq, app.description AS app_description, app.enable_flag AS app_enable_flag, app.create_time AS app_create_time, app.update_time AS app_update_time, cloud.id AS cloud_id, cloud.number AS cloud_number, cloud.name AS cloud_name FROM t_sys_app app LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud cloud ON cloud.id = app.cloud_id WHERE app.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT cloud.id AS cloud_id, cloud.name AS cloud_name, cloud.number AS cloud_number, cloud.seq AS cloud_seq, app.id AS app_id, app.name AS app_name, app.number AS app_number, app.icon AS app_icon, app.icon_color AS app_icon_color, app.seq AS app_seq, app.description AS app_description FROM t_sys_app app LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud cloud ON cloud.id = app.cloud_id INNER JOIN t_sys_menu menu ON menu.app_id = app.id INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms role_perms ON role_perms.permission_id = menu.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role_perms.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cloud.seq, app.seq

SELECT cloud.id AS cloud_id, cloud.name AS cloud_name, cloud.number AS cloud_number, cloud.seq AS cloud_seq, app.id AS app_id, app.name AS app_name, app.number AS app_number, app.icon AS app_icon, app.icon_color AS app_icon_color, app.seq AS app_seq, app.description AS app_description FROM t_sys_cloud cloud LEFT JOIN t_sys_app app ON app.cloud_id = cloud.id ORDER BY cloud.seq, app.seq, app.id

SELECT DISTINCT app.id, cloud.number AS cloud_number, app.number, app.name, app.icon, app.icon_color, app.seq, app.description FROM t_sys_app app LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud cloud ON cloud.id = app.cloud_id INNER JOIN t_sys_menu menu ON menu.app_id = app.id INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms role_perms ON role_perms.permission_id = menu.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role_perms.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{userId} AND app.number = #{appNumber} LIMIT 1
